arts.ttl: Why Birmingham City investor Tom Brady can't criticise officials despite £287m deal
arts.sum: Birmingham City investor Tom Brady faces a number of restrictions having acquired a stake in the Las Vegas Raiders NFL team. Last week it was confirmed that Brady, alongside Birmingham owner and Knighthead Capital founder Tom Wagner, had clinched a 10% stake in the NFL franchise for a $200m sum.

arts.ttl: Bolton Wanderers star to miss Birmingham City tie after ‘freak’ injury, recovery timescale confirmed
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers are set to be without George Thomason until the end of November after sustaining a ‘freak’… The post Bolton Wanderers star to miss Birmingham City tie after ‘freak’ injury, recovery timescale confirmed appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City's closest League One promotion rivals suffer broken leg blow
arts.sum: Manager Phil Parkinson confirmed striker Jack Marriott is out for several months having suffered a broken leg. Wrexham didn’t seem too affected yesterday, as Paul Mullin came into the starting line-up and bagged the only goal of their 1-0 win at Rotherham in the first minute.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City’s forgotten man is threatening to take off after hellish 18 months
arts.sum: New Blues boss Chris Davies couldn’t find a role for Hall and the 20-year-old was loaned to Walsall at the end of the summer transfer window. The Birmingham City midfielder has endured a hellish 18 months due to a succession of hamstring injuries, the first of which happened in a game at Sunderland at the tail-end of his breakout 2022/23 season.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City could be without eight players for Bolton Wanderers match as injuries bite
arts.sum: Another two key players were added to Birmingham City's injury list over the weekend after Scott Wright missed the 3-1 win at Lincoln and Emil Hansson limped off. In-form winger Wright was forced to miss the game and Hansson picked up a muscle injury shortly after half-time.

arts.ttl: ‘Left wanting more’ – Birmingham City vs Bolton Wanderers prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Birmingham City vs Bolton Wanderers prediction ahead of the League One clash on Tuesday night. The post ‘Left wanting more’ – Birmingham City vs Bolton Wanderers prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Lincoln City players left 'devastated' by rampant Birmingham City
arts.sum: Two goals from Keshi Anderson and one from Willum Willumsson ensured Blues returned to winning ways after their set-back at Charlton in their previous league game. However, the Imps boss was pleased with the way his team played and admitted they were disappointed to lose.

arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers’ George Thomason is a ‘major doubt’ for their upcoming trip to Birmingham City, as detailed in… The post Bolton Wanderers man expected to miss Birmingham City trip due to injury appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Bolton Wanderers facing injury problems ahead of key clash at Birmingham City
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers have injury concerns over three key first team players as they head to face league leaders Birmingham City on Tuesday night.
